mapper.select: SELECT * FROM live_whiteboard WHERE live_session_id = #{sessionId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO live_whiteboard ( live_session_id, course_id, schedule_event_id, scene_json, scene_version, updated_by_uid, finalized, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{liveSessionId}, #{courseId}, #{scheduleEventId}, #{sceneJson}, #{sceneVersion}, #{updatedByUid}, #{finalized}, NOW(3), NOW(3) )
mapper.update: UPDATE live_whiteboard SET scene_json = #{sceneJson}, scene_version = #{sceneVersion}, updated_by_uid = #{updatedByUid}, finalized = #{finalized}, update_time = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id}
